evals.prompt: 帮我生成一张暖色调的咖啡店内部照片，要有阳光透过窗户的感觉
evals.expected_output: A photorealistic warm-toned coffee shop interior image saved as a PNG file

evals.prompt: Generate a pixel art sword icon for a game, transparent background, 256x256
evals.expected_output: A pixel art sword icon PNG, ideally with transparent background via chroma-key removal

evals.prompt: 给我的项目生成一张 landing page 的 hero image，主题是 AI 助手，科技感蓝紫色调，保存到 /tmp/hero-image.png
evals.expected_output: A tech-themed AI assistant hero image in blue-purple tones, saved to /tmp/hero-image.png
